description.value:
Your proboscis has become particularly deadly to those around you and is either longer, stronger, or more flexible. Your proboscis gains two of the following traits: backstabber, backswing, forceful, reach 10 feet (counts as two traits), sweep, trip, versatile S.

Special If you select reach, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Drain Blood] ancestry feat or the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Siphon Poison] action of the bloodfilter orocoran heritage from up to 10 feet away.
